name: Oyster Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oysters in their liquor for about 5 minutes until the edges curl.
2. Skim off any foam or debris from the top of the liquid.
3. Combine the cooked oysters and their liquor with the scalded milk.
4. Add the butter, stirring to combine.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve immediately.
